classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, taxInformation, paymentMethod, and itemDescriptionLineItems. The presence of these fields, along with the detailed breakdown of the fare and taxes, confirms that this is an expense document related to a flight.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All required fields for expense identification are present, including detailed transaction information, payment confirmation, and itemized charges.

extraction.special_notes: Baggage allowance and charges are provided for information only. Additional discounts may apply depending on advance purchase or Flyer-specific factors. Most carriers' e-tickets have expiration dates and conditions of use. Check the carrier's fare rules for more information.
extraction.terms_conditions: If the passengers journey involves an ultimate destination or stop in a country other than the country of departure, the Montreal or the Warsaw Convention may be applicable. The Convention governs and in most cases limits the liability of carriers for death or personal injury and in respect of loss or damage to baggage. Information about prohibited or restricted materials as baggage, baggage allowance and conditions of carriage and notices is available at any Finnair service point or at www.finnair.com. Finnair customer feedback: www.finnair.com/feedback
extraction.data_protection_notice: Your personal data will be processed in accordance with the applicable carrier's privacy policy and, if your booking is made via a reservation system provider GDS, with its privacy policy. These are available at http://www.iatatravelcenter.com/privacy or from the carrier or GDS directly.
extraction.flight_sequence_notice: Flight must always be used in sequence as shown on the ticket. If you leave any part of your flights unused, the remaining flights will be automatically cancelled.
extraction.online_checkin_notice: You can check in online 36 hours before departure when your journey begins with a Finnair flight at www.finnair.com/checkin.
extraction.self_service_kiosk_notice: If you use the self-service kiosk at the airport, please use the barcode from your boarding pass or e-ticket.

issues.description: The receipt does not include the employee name as the guest/traveler. According to the compliance requirements, the employee name should be included on flight receipts.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Exception where it is not possible to use the Local Experts name e.g. on flight tickets/hotels, in which case the workers name and details should be used the end client shouldn't not be mention

issues.description: The receipt does not indicate that a separate report for each business trip should be submitted.
issues.recommendation: Please submit a separate report for each business trip
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Business Trip - submit a separate report for each trip

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing the employee name as the guest/traveler and does not indicate the requirement to submit a separate report for each business trip. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with the specified standards.
